heading: Emanuel Jofre: Main Settings : Server Farm
note: Server-farm endpoint URLs + distributed cache + process server. Most endpoints blank (platform defaults). `Minutes to Cache Time Zone Value: 20` — the customer TZ (from Details tab) is cached for 20 min client-side; relevant when testing server-generated timestamps after TZ changes.
endpointUrls: Acrobat Add-In, Adobe Add-In, AutoCAD Add-In, Conversion Service, Email Service, Enterprise LDAP Service, Excel Add-In, Fax Service, Image Viewer, Import Service, Index Server, Kofax Express Add-In, Lotus Notes Add-In, Ocr Server, Outlook Add-In, Report Server, SolidWorks Add-In, VisualVault Cloud Drive, Word Add-In: all blank
